title: pf+a REAL GLASS Rustic Effect 12x10 Picture Frames - Rustic 12x10 For 9x7 Picture Frame - 9x7 Frame With Mount
features: RUSTIC DESIGN: Beautiful 12x10 with mount for 9x7 brown wooden frame with a distressed, vintage-inspired finish that adds character to any room or wall display
DUAL DISPLAY: Features an elegant soft white mount that enhances the presentation of your cherished photographs or artwork
VERSATILE MOUNTING: Suitable for both portrait and landscape orientations, with secure wall and stand mounting fixtures included
PREMIUM MATERIALS: Crafted from a high-quality wood composite with a durable protective glass front to preserve your memories
PRECISE DIMENSIONS: The frame includes a professionally cut white mount to showcase your photographs or artwork perfectly
description: Add a touch of rustic charm to your home with this beautifully crafted 12x10 inch picture frame. The frame features a rich brown wood effect finish that showcases natural-looking grain patterns and weathered details, creating a warm, vintage aesthetic. Complete with a crisp soft white mount that elegantly frames your cherished photos and artwork, this versatile frame brings professional presentation to any space. The classic design harmoniously blends with both contemporary and traditional décor styles, making it perfect for displaying family portraits, artwork, or memorable moments in your living room, bedroom, or office. The sturdy construction ensures your precious memories are protected and displayed with style. Whether arranged individually or as part of a gallery wall, this frame adds character and sophistication to any room. The soft white mount creates a perfect border that draws attention to your displayed piece while maintaining a clean, professional appearance.
